title: Customer
description: A client company of a tenant. Top of the hierarchy: customers own sites, sites own assets. A customer in EQ Service is the legal entity SKS bills (e.g. Equinix Australia Pty Ltd, Jemena, Ramsay Health). Contract terms, CPI rules, SLAs, and standing hour allocations live here.

customer_id.description: Internal canonical ID. Generated on import if not provided.

tenant_id.description: Owning tenant. Set automatically by import context.

external_id.description: Customer's own ID in an external system. Preserved for round-trip exports.

name.description: Display name. Required. Should be the legal entity name when known.

code.description: Short identifier used in schedules and reports (e.g. 'EQX-NAT', 'EQX-HS', 'RHC').

phone.description: Primary phone. Coerced to AU format where possible.

address.description: Free-text head office address. Site-level addresses live on sites.

customer_entity_legal_name.description: Full legal entity name on the signed contract (may differ from display name).

customer_entity_abn.description: Australian Business Number (11 digits, stored as string to preserve formatting).

customer_entity_acn.description: Australian Company Number (9 digits, stored as string).

contract_template.description: Which contract template this customer is on. Drives derivation logic for year-fees, CPI, scope-coverage rules.

smca_agreement_number.description: SMCA / Master Services Agreement reference number.

schedule_agreement_number.description: Schedule agreement reference number (attached to a master agreement).

contract_term_start.description: Start date of the current contract term. Used as the Y1 base for CPI calculations.

contract_term_end.description: End date of the current contract term (before any renewal options).

contract_options.description: Free-text renewal option encoding, e.g. '+1+1' (two one-year options).

visit_cadence.description: How often the tenant attends this customer's sites for routine maintenance. Drives the calendar coverage check at xlsx import.

cpi_basis.description: How CPI is applied year-over-year. Equinix AU SMCA = simple_on_y1_base (Y_n = Y1*(1+rate*(n-1))) — NOT compound.

cpi_rate.description: Annual CPI rate as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.05 = 5%).

fiscal_year_basis.description: Whether contract years align to Australian FY (1 Jul - 30 Jun) or calendar year (1 Jan - 31 Dec, Equinix).

payment_terms_days.description: Days from invoice to payment due (e.g. 45 for Equinix Net 45).

min_hours_after_hours.description: Minimum charge in hours for an after-hours call-out.

min_hours_weekend.description: Minimum charge in hours for a weekend call-out.

hourly_rate_effective_from.description: Date from which the current hourly rates apply.

sla_response_minutes.description: Maximum minutes to acknowledge a reactive call (15 for Equinix Premium).

sla_onsite_hours.description: Maximum hours to be on-site after a reactive call (2 for Equinix).

sla_resolution_hours.description: Maximum hours to fully resolve a reactive call (24 for Equinix).

monthly_report_due_day.description: Day of month by which the monthly performance report must be issued (Equinix = 7).

pm_reschedule_notice_days.description: Notice required (days) before rescheduling a PM visit. Equinix = 30.

service_credit_pm_breach_pct.description: Service credit as fraction of annual contract value for PM breach (e.g. 0.03 = 3%).

service_credit_reactive_breach_pct.description: Service credit as fraction of annual contract value for reactive breach.

service_credit_spares_breach_pct.description: Service credit as fraction of annual contract value for spares breach.

management_hours_per_period.description: Standing supervisor/planner overhead allocation absorbed into the contract value, NOT scheduled to specific dates. Equinix = 80 hrs/quarter.

active.description: Whether this customer is currently active.

x-eq-cross-field-rules.rule: contract_term_end == null OR contract_term_start == null OR contract_term_end > contract_term_start
x-eq-cross-field-rules.message: Contract term end is not after contract term start.

x-eq-cross-field-rules.rule: cpi_basis == null OR cpi_basis == 'none' OR cpi_rate != null
x-eq-cross-field-rules.message: cpi_basis set but no cpi_rate provided.
management_hours_per_period set but no management_period_basis to interpret it.

x-eq-import-hints.description: Customer registers are usually small (10-50 rows) and come from accounting exports or a manual list.

common_sources.name: Accounting export (Xero / MYOB customer list)
watchouts: ABN may have spaces or no formatting — preserve as text
Some rows are individuals, not companies — flag for review

common_sources.name: Contract register spreadsheet
watchouts: CPI may be '5%' or '0.05' or '5' — coerce as fraction (5% → 0.05)
Net Days often free-text 'Net 45' — coerce to integer
